New Work Item
Instructions for -
What the AI has learned about this app. The agent reads this on every session and appends to it as it discovers workflows, UI maps, and keybindings. Paste instructions below and hit Save to seed it before a session.
Automations for -
Your automations
Drag to insert
UI elements
Select an automation on the left or click New to create one.
Describe it, AI writes the steps
Variables - one per line: name = description. Use {{name}} in steps.
Inputs - prompted per run, one per line: name | label | placeholder (last two optional). Referenced as {{name}} in steps.
Window setup
Steps
Verbs: CLICK, TYPE, PRESS, WAIT, FIND, VERIFY, IF/ELSE/ENDIF, REPEAT/ENDREPEAT. Arrow -> separates a target from typed text (e.g. TYPE input -> hello). Coordinates x,y skip the vision locator.
Verify after run (optional)
Elements that MUST appear at the end
Elements that must NOT appear
Recent runs
Reset to factory settings?

This will delete everything a clean install would not have:

  • All configured PATs, API keys, and preferences
  • All plugin configs and installed third-party plugins
  • All custom themes, notes, recipes, and learnings
  • Display preferences (sidebar widths, etc.)

You cannot undo this. Export first if you want to keep anything.

Settings
Azure DevOps Connection
Connect to your Azure DevOps organization to manage work items, sprints, and pull requests.
Installed AI CLIs
Manage the terminal-based AI agents available in Symphonee. Click Install to add any missing tools.
Detecting installed AI CLIs...
Default AI
Choose which AI agent is selected when the app starts.
API Keys
Optional API keys unlock additional models. Without these, CLIs use your subscription login. With a key, the CLI uses API billing instead and all models become available.
Browser Automation
AI-controlled browser sessions for account creation and authentication. Requires playwright-core to be installed. Embedded pages now use their own site-defined colors without a Symphonee dark-mode override.
Saved credentials (AI-owned accounts):
Spaces
Group repositories by context (Personal, Business, Freelance). A space can also hold plugins and notes without owning any repo.
Repositories
Add local repositories to browse files, view diffs, and create pull requests.
No plugins installed.
External MCP Servers
Connect to external Model Context Protocol servers to add their tools, resources, and prompts to Symphonee. Each server runs as a child process via stdio.
No servers configured.
Add a Server
Example: npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github
Themes
Select a preset or a saved custom theme.
Custom Theme
Custom (unsaved)
Pick a mode, tint, text color, and accent. Changes preview live.
Mode
Advanced
Sidebar (left)
Header + Tab Bar
Terminal
Content Area
Share Themes
Export your saved themes to share with friends, or import themes from a file.
AI Orchestration
The lead AI dispatches tasks to other installed CLIs and can run Graph Runs (durable multi-step workflows with branching, approval gates, and crash recovery). Pick which CLIs the orchestrator is allowed to dispatch to.
Select which AIs the orchestrator can dispatch to:
Incognito Mode
When enabled, all external provider connections (work item trackers, code hosts, and any plugin-contributed integrations) are blocked: no reading or writing work items, no PRs, no push/pull/fetch. Only local operations (commits, checkouts, local git history, file editing) remain available. Requires a restart to update AI instructions.
GitHub
Connect to GitHub to view and review pull requests from the dashboard.
Voice Input (OpenAI Whisper)
Hold Ctrl+Shift to talk, release to transcribe. Uses OpenAI Whisper API ($0.006/min).
Add a key to enable voice input

Git

Pull Latest Changes
Fetch and merge the latest changes from the remote into your current branch.
On branch ...
Push Changes
Push your local commits on the current branch to the remote repository.
On branch ...
Commit Changes
Stage and commit your changes. Write a custom message or let AI generate one for you.
On branch ...
Loading changed files...
AI will review your changes, suggest a commit message, and create the commit in the terminal.
Compare Branches
Select two branches to compare. AI will analyze the differences and provide insights.
